era_context: Same as -900 to -903. Neo-Assyrian consolidation, Greek Archaic period, Western Zhou decline, Maya Classic period.
geographic_coverage_gaps: All regions except the Near East, and even there documentation is sparse
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: 904 BCE is not documented in surviving historical sources. This year, like most years in the early 1st millennium BCE, is historically undocumented. The surviving historical record is fundamentally episodic, not continuous. Scholars can describe the general trajectory of civilizations during this period (Assyrian expansion, Greek development, Chinese fragmentation, Maya transformation) but cannot provide year-by-year narratives for most of the ancient world.
